resource_notes: Foundation for all subsequent infrastructure. Requires strict adherence to security groups and subnet isolation.
alternative_approach: Use pre-built AWS VPC modules, reducing custom logic maintenance.

mitigation_strategy: Peer review with Security Lead; Use verified Terraform modules.
